title: Missing BUILD_ASSERT for LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_STATIC_SYNC_CONFIG_SECTIONS
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:1027-1028

  BUILD_ASSERT(ARRAY_SIZE(s_config_sections) ==
           LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_STATIC_SYNC_CONFIG_SECTIONS);

This assertion ensures the s_config_sections array matches the expected count. Good.

However, there are related calculations in adapter.h that depend on this value:

  #define LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_STATIC_SYNC_RECORDS \
      (LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_STATIC_SYNC_FIXED_RECORDS + \
       LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_STATIC_SYNC_CONFIG_SECTIONS)

If STATIC_SYNC_FIXED_RECORDS (5) is wrong, the queue preflight calculations will be incorrect. There's no assertion that the actual number of non-config static sync messages matches STATIC_SYNC_FIXED_RECORDS.

In enqueue_static_sync, there are exactly 5 non-config messages:
1. my_info
2. metadata
3. region_presets
4. channel
5. module_config

But if someone adds a 6th message without updating the constant, sync will fail mysteriously.

Add a BUILD_ASSERT or runtime check.
close_reason: Added BUILD_ASSERT for LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_STATIC_SYNC_FIXED_RECORDS matching the 5 fixed enqueue calls in adapter.c. Tests covered by meshtastic_adapter ZTEST suite. Commit c43c314e6
